info.description: Card management, user onboarding, KYC, and banking services.
info.title: CardHub API

get.description: Get all addresses for the authenticated user (JWT auth)
Return configuration/credentials needed by the frontend at startup
Return users filtered by card status for post-onboarding communication (BasicToken auth)
Return card status for a specific mobile number for post-onboarding comms (BasicToken auth)
get.summary: Get card status for a user (comms)

get.description: Retrieve card details for the authenticated user (JWT auth)

post.description: Submit name and father name for card creation (JWT auth)

patch.description: Update name or father name on card (JWT auth)

get.description: Return suggested names to print on the card for the authenticated user (JWT auth)

post.description: Hard-delete all data for a given mobile number (BasicToken auth, internal)
Submit current residential address and trigger CAF1 at bank (JWT auth)

patch.description: Update an existing current address record (JWT auth)
Mark an existing address as the card delivery address (JWT auth)

get.description: Return occupation, company, industry and other dropdown lists (JWT auth)
Generate eKYC URL for the authenticated user (JWT auth)
Get the flow status for a user from either flow_statuses or user_level_histories table

post.description: Create or update a flow status record pushed from the OL service (IAuth)

get.description: Get the user info for a user
Returns service status

post.description: Search for a user by mobile, email, or user ID for CX tools (BasicToken auth)

get.description: Return user data and last saved level by mobile number for the OL BRE service (IAuth)

post.description: Upload a CSV file to bulk-insert application status records (OnCall token auth)

parameters.description: CSV file with application status records
parameters.name: file

post.description: Retry failed CAF1 bank API calls for applications in a date range (OnCall token auth)
Enable or disable a static OTP for a test mobile number (OnCall token auth)
Retrieve encrypted log entries by traceType and traceId, then decrypt them (LogsAuth)

get.description: Return master list data for the YBL flow (IAuth)

post.description: Update the status of a notification
Send a one-time password to the given mobile number
Verify OTP, create user session, and return JWT token

get.description: Return city and state information for a given pincode (JWT auth)

post.description: Validate a pincode and update the user's current address pincode (JWT auth)

get.description: Return pre-filled address data from external services (JWT auth)
Return pre-filled user details sourced from external services by mobile number (JWT auth)
Return pre-filled user details sourced from external services by PAN (JWT auth)
Return vKYC screen render data including off-hours and outage info (JWT auth)

post.description: Generate an SDK JWT token for an approved/activated card user

get.description: Return stored consent flags for a user by encoded mobile number

post.description: Authenticate via SSO using encoded mobile number, return JWT token

get.description: Return static pre-screening eligibility result for the authenticated user (JWT auth)
Retrieve the bank application status for the authenticated user (JWT auth)
Retrieve the authenticated user's personal details (JWT auth)
Retrieve professional profile for the authenticated user (JWT auth)

post.description: Submit office/professional profile for the authenticated user (JWT auth)

get.description: Generate video KYC URL for the authenticated user (JWT auth)
Return questions and pre-filled answers for the vKYC session (JWT auth)
Return the current video KYC status for the authenticated user (JWT auth)

post.description: Save a current or delivery address using encoded mobile number (IAuth)

get.description: Retrieve all saved addresses for a user by encoded mobile number (IAuth)
Retrieve consent flags for a user by encoded mobile number (IAuth)

post.description: Submit consent flags for a user using encoded mobile number (IAuth)
Create a new user record from OL with full personal details (IAuth)
Update personal details fields like name, email, PAN, DOB (IAuth)

get.description: Generate eKYC URL using encoded mobile number (IAuth)
Return current eKYC/vKYC stage status for a user (IAuth)
Return suggested card names using encoded mobile number (IAuth)
Retrieve card details using encoded mobile number (IAuth)

post.description: Submit card name using encoded mobile number (IAuth)

get.description: Retrieve professional profile using encoded mobile number (IAuth)

post.description: Submit professional profile using encoded mobile number (IAuth)

get.description: Return user journey stage and status for the YBL flow (IAuth)
Return vKYC service availability and off-hours status (IAuth)
Return vKYC Q&A data using encoded mobile number (IAuth)
Return vKYC application status for a user by encoded mobile number (IAuth)
Generate video KYC URL using encoded mobile number (IAuth)

post.description: Receive KYC/vKYC status callback from YesBank and update internal state

get.description: Return dynamic master list data for dropdowns (JWT auth)

post.description: Submit personal details for user onboarding (JWT auth)

is_rebranded.description: true when create-user called from OL for a fresh OL user (analytics)

promo_consent.description:
IsPoliticallyExposed     bool   `json:"is_politically_exposed"`
UserCommConsent          bool   `json:"user_comm_consent" validate:"required"`
TermConditionConsent     bool   `json:"term_condition_consent"  validate:"required"`
IsOfficerRelationConsent bool   `json:"officer_relation_consent"`
OverLimitConsent         bool   `json:"overlimit_consent"`
